metadata.description: Azure region for the app resource
Deployment environment: dev | staging | prod
ACA managed environment resource ID
Control Plane user-assigned managed identity resource ID
Control Plane user-assigned managed identity client ID (used by DefaultAzureCredential inside the container)
Full image reference, e.g. racdevacrczo2xbgcnq.azurecr.io/rac-control-plane:dev-001
ACR login server, e.g. racdevacrczo2xbgcnq.azurecr.io
Platform Key Vault URI, e.g. https://kv-rac-xxxx-dev.vault.azure.net/
Postgres server FQDN, e.g. rac-dev-pg-xxx.postgres.database.azure.com
Postgres application database name (e.g. rac)
Postgres login user (smoke-test default: rac_admin from bootstrap)
Name of the Key Vault secret holding the Postgres password (lives in platform KV; operator seeds before deploy by copying from bootstrap KV).
Parent DNS domain, e.g. rac-dev.rac.checkwithscience.com
Institution display name, surfaced in the SPA and emails
Optional brand logo URL
Entra tenant ID for OIDC
Entra app registration client ID for the user-facing OIDC flow
Entra app registration client ID for the API / client-credentials flow
Tier 3 dynamic apps resource group name
Subscription ID where Tier 3 apps live
DNS zone name (parent zone the control plane provisions records under)
Storage account name where researcher uploads are staged
Blob account URL for the storage account
Files-storage account key KV secret name (for ACA volume mounts on Tier 3)
ACR login server (also passed as RAC_ACR_LOGIN_SERVER env)
ACA environment resource ID (for Tier 3 provisioning)
App Gateway public IP (informational, used by control plane to render researcher URLs)
Scan severity gate threshold for approvals
Approver role name for the research/leadership stage
Approver role name for the IT stage
Pipeline timeout in minutes
GitHub owner of the rac-pipeline repo
GitHub repo name for the pipeline
Enable Prometheus/OpenTelemetry metrics endpoint
OTLP exporter endpoint (leave empty to disable OTLP export)
Resource tags

containers.name: control-plane
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'RAC_PG_PASSWORD', 'secretRef', parameters('pgPasswordSecretName')), createObject('name', 'RAC_ENV', 'value', parameters('racEnv')), createObject('name', 'RAC_INSTITUTION_NAME', 'value', parameters('institutionName')), createObject('name', 'RAC_PARENT_DOMAIN', 'value', parameters('parentDomain')), createObject('name', 'RAC_BRAND_LOGO_URL', 'value', parameters('brandLogoUrl')), createObject('name', 'RAC_IDP_TENANT_ID', 'value', parameters('idpTenantId')), createObject('name', 'RAC_IDP_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('idpClientId')), createObject('name', 'RAC_IDP_API_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('idpApiClientId')), createObject('name', 'RAC_PG_HOST', 'value', parameters('pgHost')), createObject('name', 'RAC_PG_PORT', 'value', '5432'), createObject('name', 'RAC_PG_DB', 'value', parameters('pgDatabase')), createObject('name', 'RAC_PG_USER', 'value', parameters('pgUser')), createObject('name', 'RAC_PG_SSL_MODE', 'value', 'require'), createObject('name', 'RAC_KV_URI', 'value', parameters('kvUri')), createObject('name', 'RAC_BLOB_ACCOUNT_URL', 'value', parameters('blobAccountUrl')), createObject('name', 'RAC_ACR_LOGIN_SERVER', 'value', parameters('acrLoginServer')), createObject('name', 'RAC_ACA_ENV_RESOURCE_ID', 'value', parameters('acaEnvResourceId')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SUBSCRIPTION_ID', 'value', parameters('subscriptionId')), createObject('name', 'RAC_RESOURCE_GROUP', 'value', parameters('tier3ResourceGroupName')), createObject('name', 'RAC_AZURE_LOCATION', 'value', parameters('location')), createObject('name', 'RAC_DNS_ZONE_NAME', 'value', parameters('dnsZoneName')), createObject('name', 'RAC_FILES_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME', 'value', parameters('storageAccountName')), createObject('name', 'RAC_FILES_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_KEY_KV_SECRET_NAME', 'value', parameters('filesStorageAccountKeySecretName')), createObject('name', 'RAC_MANAGED_IDENTITY_RESOURCE_ID', 'value', parameters('controlPlaneMiResourceId')), createObject('name', 'RAC_CONTROLPLANE_MANAGED_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('controlPlaneMiClientId')), createObject('name', 'RAC_APP_GATEWAY_PUBLIC_IP', 'value', parameters('appGatewayPublicIp')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SCAN_SEVERITY_GATE', 'value', parameters('scanSeverityGate')), createObject('name', 'RAC_APPROVER_ROLE_RESEARCH', 'value', parameters('approverRoleResearch')), createObject('name', 'RAC_APPROVER_ROLE_IT', 'value', parameters('approverRoleIt')), createObject('name', 'RAC_PIPELINE_TIMEOUT_MINUTES', 'value', string(parameters('pipelineTimeoutMinutes'))), createObject('name', 'RAC_GH_PIPELINE_OWNER', 'value', parameters('githubPipelineOwner')), createObject('name', 'RAC_GH_PIPELINE_REPO', 'value', parameters('githubPipelineRepo')), createObject('name', 'RAC_METRICS_ENABLED', 'value', string(parameters('metricsEnabled'))), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('controlPlaneMiClientId'))), if(empty(parameters('otlpEndpoint')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'RAC_OTLP_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('otlpEndpoint')))))]

metadata.description: Resource ID of the control plane Container App
Internal FQDN of the control plane (used as App Gateway backend target if/when host-routed)
